description.short: Discover Hotel O Banda Aceh, conveniently located near the historic Masjid Raya Baiturrahman. This hotel offers a unique blend of cultural heritage and modern convenience. Enjoy a seamless arrival and departure with express check-in/check-out and attentive room service tailored for the needs of two travelers. Select rooms feature refreshing garden views, ensuring a serene atmosphere during your stay. Each room is equipped with air conditioning and complimentary internet access, allowing guests to stay connected while exploring the rich history and stunning landscapes of Banda Aceh. Experience comfort and convenience in this ideal retreat. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.reviewNegatives:
Room is not that close with Masjid Baitulrahaman as it suggested

The room is smelly from the toilet, i think its from the septic tank. The smell comes out from the drain holes. 

The ceiling/wall some are mouldy. You can see traces of leaking as well. So when you lie down and look up, it feels like the place is not clean.

Toilet flush cant be use.
